CONTENT.Club career: Goiginger has played for Union Vöcklamarkt, TSV Neumarkt, SV Grödig, FC Blau-Weiß Linz, and LASK Linz.In February 2024, Goiginger joined 2. Bundesliga club VfL Osnabrück.On 19 July 2024, Goiginger returned to Blau-Weiß Linz on a two-year deal.
CONTENT.International career: In November 2018, Goiginger was called up to the Austria squad for the first team and was unused substitute during their UEFA Nations League matches against Bosnia and Herzegovina and Northern Ireland.He made his debut on 19 November 2019 in a Euro 2020 qualifier against Latvia. He started the game and played the first 69 minutes.

SUMMARY: Thomas Goiginger (born 15 March 1993) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Blau-Weiß Linz.
